intro: Lophodium × uliginosum, also known as bog saw-grass or bog cotton grass, is a rare and unique hybrid plant that belongs to the family Asteraceae. This plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its potential health benefits, including the treatment of coughs, colds, and respiratory issues, as well as its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties.
